nl_question: Bucket delivered orders by how many days late they were versus the estimated delivery date (early, on time, 1-3 days late, 4-7 days late, 8-15 days late, more than 15 days late) and for each bucket show the number of orders, the average review score, and the percentage of reviews that are 1 star.
sql: WITH delivery AS (SELECT o."order_id", DATEDIFF('day', TRY_TO_DATE(o."order_estimated_delivery_date"), TRY_TO_DATE(o."order_delivered_customer_date")) AS days_late FROM "BRAZILIAN_E_COMMERCE"."BRAZILIAN_E_COMMERCE"."OLIST_ORDERS" o WHERE o."order_status" = 'delivered'), bucketed AS (SELECT d."order_id", d.days_late, CASE WHEN d.days_late < 0 THEN 'Early' WHEN d.days_late = 0 THEN 'On Time' WHEN d.days_late <= 3 THEN '1-3 Days Late' WHEN d.days_late <= 7 THEN '4-7 Days Late' WHEN d.days_late <= 15 THEN '8-15 Days Late' ELSE 'More Than 15 Days Late' END AS delivery_bucket, CASE WHEN d.days_late < 0 THEN 1 WHEN d.days_late = 0 THEN 2 WHEN d.days_late <= 3 THEN 3 WHEN d.days_late <= 7 THEN 4 WHEN d.days_late <= 15 THEN 5 ELSE 6 END AS bucket_sort FROM delivery d) SELECT b.delivery_bucket, COUNT(DISTINCT b."order_id") AS order_count, ROUND(AVG(r."review_score"), 2) AS avg_review_score, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN r."review_score" = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(r."review_score"), 2) AS pct_1_star_reviews FROM bucketed b INNER JOIN "BRAZILIAN_E_COMMERCE"."BRAZILIAN_E_COMMERCE"."OLIST_ORDER_REVIEWS" r ON b."order_id" = r."order_id" GROUP BY b.delivery_bucket, b.bucket_sort ORDER BY b.bucket_sort
